-Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Wsuggest-override -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -Wno-strict-overflow -fdiagnostics-show-option -pthread -fomit-frame-pointer -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections    -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG   -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-undefined
